raw_text:
Velocity Labs

Junior Android Engineer

LOCATION

Austin, TX

TYPE

Full-time

COMPENSATION

$75,000 - $95,000 USD annually

TECH STACK

Kotlin

Jetpack Compose

Android Studio

Kotlin Coroutines

Room Database

Android Jetpack libraries

Retrofit (REST APIs)

Gradle

Google Play Console

About Velocity Labs: Velocity Labs is a fintech-focused mobile
software company specializing in cross-platform applications for
financial services. Founded in 2019, we're a growing team of 45
engineers based in Austin, Texas, committed to crafting seamless,
performant Android applications that serve millions of users globally.

We're looking for a Junior Android Engineer to join our mobile team. In
this role, you'll develop and maintain features for our flagship Android
application using modern Android technologies. You'll work closely
with senior engineers, participate in code reviews, and contribute to our
mission of making financial services more accessible. This is an
excellent opportunity to grow your Android development skills in a
collaborative, fast-paced environment.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Develop new features and UI components using Kotlin and Jetpack
Compose following established design systems and best practices

Write clean, testable code and actively participate in code reviews to
learn from and support teammates

Debug and troubleshoot Android application issues using Android
Studio and collaborate with QA to resolve bugs

Implement data persistence using Room database for local caching
and offline functionality

Utilize Kotlin Coroutines to handle asynchronous tasks and manage
background operations efficiently

Prepare features for Play Store deployment by following Google Play
guidelines and participating in release management

Document code and technical decisions to maintain knowledge

sharing across the team

Attend sprint planning, standups, and retrospectives to coordinate
work and contribute ideas for team improvement

REQUIREMENTS

Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or

related field (or equivalent professional experience)

0-2 years of professional Android development experience or
substantial portfolio of Android projects

Strong proficiency in Kotlin programming language

Solid understanding of Android fundamentals including Activities,
Fragments, Intents, and lifecycle management

Building intuitive mobile experiences thatempower users to move faster Experience building user interfaces with XML layouts or basic
familiarity with Jetpack Compose

BONUS POINTS

Experience with Jetpack Compose for building modern declarative
UIs

Familiarity with Kotlin Coroutines for asynchronous programming

Understanding of Room ORM and SQLite database concepts

Published or open-source Android projects on GitHub

BENEFITS

Competitive health, dental, and vision insurance coverage

401(k) matching up to 4% of salary

Unlimited paid time off with a minimum of 15 days encouraged

Professional development budget of $1,500 annually for courses and
conferences

Flexible hybrid work arrangement (2 days in office, 3 days remote)

Snacks, beverages, and monthly team lunches

MacBook Pro and latest development tools provided

APPLY

Please submit your resume, cover letter, and a link to your GitHub
profile or Android portfolio to careers@velocitylabs.io. Include links to
any published Android apps or open-source projects you've contributed
to. We review applications on a rolling basis and will follow up within
two weeks of submission.
